subcodes.first_line: The verses have been revealed, and the Book speaketh, and the Promised One hath appeared; yet the people of the earth remain veiled by the doubts and misconceptions of the ignorant divines [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آیات نازل و کتاب ناطق و موعود ظاهر و لکن اهل ارض را حجبات و شبهات علمای جاهل
